name: Lasker Morris
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Emanuel Lasker's improved Nine Men's Morris (Ten Men's Morris): ten men each on the classic 24-point board, and -- the key change -- on every turn while you still hold men in hand you may either place a new man or slide one already on the board, freely interleaved. Form a mill (three in a row) to capture an enemy man; reduce the opponent below three men to win.
